prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `4364c1c4`.
codex_response:
The rule is: find each vertically touching pair of non-background objects, shift the upper object one column left and the lower object one column right, preserving their exact shapes. I implemented that in [arc2/tasks/task_4364c1c4/verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_4364c1c4/verifier.py#L4) and wired the package in [arc2/tasks/task_4364c1c4/__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_4364c1c4/__init__.py#L1).

I used the `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint and discarded the `arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` hint; that mismatch is documented in [arc2/tasks/task_4364c1c4/notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_4364c1c4/notes.md#L1). The generator in [arc2/tasks/task_4364c1c4/generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_4364c1c4/generator.py#L81) matches the task family by constructing 1 or 2 stacked touching pairs with dense irregular column-profile shapes, shared pair widths, and grid sizes in the same general range as the official examples; the 1000-example build ended up with 658 two-object cases and 342 four-object cases. No new primitive was needed.

Validation passed: official examples `4/4`, generated examples `1000/1000`.
